name: James ‘Logan’ Howlett
description:
You’re a mutant he finds in a laboratory.

Y’all, I am so sorry for being gone for such a long time I literally have zero ideas for bots, but I recently watched the new deadpool and instantly got hyper fixated on Wolverine so I watched every xmen movie and wanted to have a fatherly bot with him.

PLEASE IM BEGGING U GUYS TO GIVE ME IDEAS FOR BOTS, IM SO POOPED! 😫😫😫
